tracks.meaning: a piece of software code or a file that fixes bugs or adds features to an existing program
a small piece of material or medication applied to the skin to deliver drugs through the skin
to repair or mend something that is broken or damaged
a small area of land or ground, typically of distinctive character
a plot of cultivated ground or farmland
a piece or section of something, such as a patch of fabric or a patch of color
a small piece of fabric worn on a uniform to identify rank, unit, or achievement
to walk or move around an area, typically while on duty or patrol
to connect a telephone call or audio signal between two parties
to resolve or reconcile differences, as in 'patch things up'
a temporary or permanent repair made to a surface, wall, or road
